---
title: "Schistosomiasis, anemia, and immune response"
---

# Schistosomiasis, anemia, and immune response

Collaborative work examining how infection relates to human health outcomes, immune response, anemia, and disease burden.

## Project angle

This work connects parasite exposure and infection with health outcomes and biological response in human populations.

## Methods and outputs

- Field-informed public health research
- Infection and health outcome analysis
- Immunology and anemia framing
- Cross-disciplinary collaboration
